data.en: Postcards always spoil my holidays.
data.cn: 明信片总搅得我假日不得安宁。
data.hint: spoil 意为“损坏，使索然无味”；always 频度副词。
accept: Always postcards spoil my holidays.

data.en: Last summer, I went to Italy.
data.cn: 去年夏天，我去了意大利。
data.hint: Last summer 过去时间状语；went 是 go 的过去式。
accept: I went to Italy last summer.

data.en: I visited museums and sat in public gardens.
data.cn: 我参观了博物馆，还去了公园。
data.hint: visited 和 sat 并列过去式；public gardens 公共公园。
accept: I sat in public gardens and visited museums.

data.en: A friendly waiter taught me a few words of Italian.
data.cn: 一位好客的服务员教了我几句意大利语。
data.hint: friendly 友好的；taught 是 teach 的过去式；a few words 几句话。
accept: A friendly waiter taught a few words of Italian to me.

data.en: Then he lent me a book.
data.cn: 之后还借给我一本书。
data.hint: lent 是 lend 的过去式，这里是双宾语结构。
accept: Then he lent a book to me.

data.en: I read a few lines, but I did not understand a word.
data.cn: 我读了几行，但一个字也不懂。
data.hint: read 过去式读音为 /red/；did not understand 否定过去式。
accept: I read a few lines but did not understand a word.

data.en: Every day I thought about postcards.
data.cn: 我每天都想着明信片的事。
data.hint: Every day 每天；thought 是 think 的过去式；think about 思考。
accept: I thought about postcards every day.

data.en: My holidays passed quickly, but I did not send cards to my friends.
data.cn: 假期过得真快，可我还没有给我的朋友们寄过一张明信片。
data.hint: passed quickly 飞逝；did not send 没寄；send sth. to sb.
accept: My holidays passed quickly, but I did not send my friends cards.

data.en: On the last day I made a big decision.
data.cn: 到了最后一天，我作出了一项重大决定。
data.hint: On the last day 在最后一天；made a decision 做决定。
accept: I made a big decision on the last day.

data.en: I got up early and bought thirty-seven cards.
data.cn: 我早早起了床，买来了 37 张明信片。
data.hint: got up 起床；bought 是 buy 的过去式；thirty-seven 37。
accept: I bought thirty-seven cards and got up early.

data.en: I spent the whole day in my room, but I did not write a single card!
data.cn: 我在房间里关了整整一天。然而竟连一张明信片也没写成！
data.hint: spent 过去式；the whole day 整天；single 单一的，唯一的。
accept: I spent the whole day in my room, but did not write a single card!

data.en: How many cards did the writer send?
data.cn: 作者寄了多少张卡片？
data.hint: How many 提问数量，过去时用助动词 did。

data.en: He did not send a single card.
data.cn: 他连一张明信片也没寄。
data.hint: did not send 过去否定式；single 唯一的。
accept: He did not send even a single card.

data.en: He stayed in his room all day.
data.cn: 他整天待在房间里。
data.hint: stayed 过去式；all day 整天。
accept: All day he stayed in his room.

data.en: Why did postcards spoil his holidays?
data.cn: 明信片为什么搅得他假日不得安宁？
data.hint: spoil 使索然无味，疑问句用 did 引导。

data.en: He always thought about postcards.
data.cn: 他总是想着明信片的事。
data.hint: always 频度副词；thought think的过去式。

data.en: He bought thirty-seven cards on the last day.
data.cn: 他在最后一天买了 37 张卡片。
data.hint: bought 过去式；on the last day 在最后一天。
accept: On the last day he bought thirty-seven cards.

data.en: A friendly waiter taught him some Italian.
data.cn: 一位好客的服务员教了他一些意大利语。
data.hint: friendly 友好的；taught teach的过去式。
accept: A friendly waiter taught some Italian to him.

data.en: He could not understand a word.
data.cn: 他一个字也不懂。
data.hint: could not understand 过去否定形式。
accept: He did not understand a word.

data.en: He did not write to his friends.
data.cn: 他没有给他的朋友们写信。
data.hint: write to sb. 给某人写信。
accept: He did not write his friends.

data.en: My friend, Roy, died last year.
data.cn: 我的朋友罗伊去年去世了。
data.hint: died 过去式，表示人去世；last year 去年。
accept: Last year, my friend, Roy, died.

data.en: He left me his CD player and his collection of CDs.
data.cn: 他给我留下了他的CD机和收集的CD。
data.hint: left 是 leave 的过去式；collection 收集物。
accept: He left his CD player and his collection of CDs to me.

data.en: Roy spent a lot of money on CDs.
data.cn: 罗伊在CD上花了很多钱。
data.hint: spend money on sth. 在某物上花钱；spent 过去式。
accept: Roy spent on CDs a lot of money.

data.en: He bought one or two new CDs every week.
data.cn: 他每周都买一两张新CD。
data.hint: bought 过去式；one or two 一两个；every week 每周。
accept: Every week he bought one or two new CDs.

data.en: He never went to the cinema or to the theatre.
data.cn: 他从不去电影院或剧院。
data.hint: never 频度副词；went to the cinema 去电影院；or 连接并列成分。
accept: He never went to the theatre or to the cinema.

data.en: He stayed at home every evening and listened to music.
data.cn: 他每天晚上都待在家里听音乐。
data.hint: stayed at home 待在家里；listened to music 听音乐。
accept: He listened to music and stayed at home every evening.

data.en: He often lent CDs to his friends.
data.cn: 他经常借CD给他的朋友们。
data.hint: lent sth. to sb. 借给某人某物；often 频度副词。
accept: He often lent his friends CDs.

data.en: Sometimes they kept them.
data.cn: 有时他们就据为己有了。
data.hint: kept 是 keep 的过去式，表示保存、保存不还。
accept: They kept them sometimes.

data.en: He lost many CDs in this way.
data.cn: 他以这种方式丢失了许多CD。
data.hint: lost 是 lose 的过去式；in this way 以这种方式。
accept: In this way he lost many CDs.

data.en: Roy loved music very much.
data.cn: 罗伊非常喜欢音乐。
data.hint: loved 过去式；very much 非常。
accept: Roy loved music a lot.

data.en: Did Roy leave you his CD player?
data.cn: 罗伊把CD机留给你了吗？
data.hint: 过去时的疑问句用 did 引导，动词用原形。

data.en: He did not go to the cinema.
data.cn: 他没有去电影院。
data.hint: did not go 过去否定式。
accept: He didn't go to the cinema.

data.en: He preferred staying at home and listening to music.
data.cn: 他更喜欢待在家里听音乐。
data.hint: prefer doing sth. 更喜欢做某事。
accept: He preferred to stay at home and listen to music.

data.en: Did he lend CDs to his friends?
data.cn: 他借CD给他的朋友们了吗？
data.hint: lend sth. to sb. 借出。
accept: Did he lend his friends CDs?

data.en: She bought me a tie.
data.cn: 她给我买了一条领带。
data.hint: bought sb. sth. 给某人买某物。
accept: She bought a tie for me.

data.en: She made me a cake.
data.cn: 她给我做了一个蛋糕。
data.hint: made sb. sth. 为某人做某物。
accept: She made a cake for me.

data.en: He sent me a card.
data.cn: 他给我寄了一张卡片。
data.hint: sent sb. sth. 寄给某人某物。
accept: He sent a card to me.

data.en: He passed me the salt.
data.cn: 他把盐递给了我。
data.hint: passed sb. sth. 递给某人某物。
accept: He passed the salt to me.

data.en: I spent the whole day reading books.
data.cn: 我花了整整一天看书。
data.hint: spend time doing sth. 花时间做某事。
accept: I spent the whole day to read books.

data.en: They did not keep the books.
data.cn: 他们没有保留这些书。
data.hint: did not keep 否定过去式。
accept: They didn't keep the books.

data.en: He paid the shopkeeper some money.
data.cn: 他付给店主一些钱。
data.hint: paid sb. sth. 付给某人钱。
accept: He paid some money to the shopkeeper.

data.en: He handed me the prize.
data.cn: 他把奖品递给我了。
data.hint: handed sb. sth. 把某物递给某人。
accept: He handed the prize to me.

data.en: The waiter brought a bottle of beer to the man.
data.cn: 服务员给那人拿来了一瓶啤酒。
data.hint: brought sth. to sb. 带某物给某人。
accept: The waiter brought the man a bottle of beer.

data.en: He sold all his books to me.
data.cn: 他把他所有的书都卖给我了。
data.hint: sold sth. to sb. 卖给某人。
accept: He sold me all his books.

data.en: The shop assistant found some curtain material for me.
data.cn: 店员为我找到了一些窗帘料子。
data.hint: found sth. for sb. 寻找某物给某人。
accept: The shop assistant found me some curtain material.

data.en: He did me a big favour.
data.cn: 他帮了我一个大忙。
data.hint: do sb. a favour 帮某人忙。
accept: He did a big favour for me.

data.en: She showed her husband her new hat.
data.cn: 她向她丈夫展示了她的新帽子。
data.hint: showed sb. sth. 向某人展示某物。
accept: She showed her new hat to her husband.

data.en: She promised a reward to the finder.
data.cn: 她向找到者许诺了赏金。
data.hint: promised sth. to sb. 许诺某物给某人。
accept: She promised the finder a reward.

data.en: He gave his son some advice.
data.cn: 他给他儿子提出了一些建议。
data.hint: gave sb. some advice 给出建议；advice 不可数。
accept: He gave some advice to his son.

data.en: His uncle left him some money.
data.cn: 他叔叔给他留了一些钱。
data.hint: left sb. sth. 留下某物给某人。
accept: His uncle left some money to him.
His uncle left some money for him.
